discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: From Supp Fig 16b, fold change in GLI3 in S462TY cells treated with sonidegib?
B. REPORTED RESULT: ~0.32 (reduction, n=3)
C. MODEL RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
D. DENOMINATOR: N/A
E. ASSUMPTIONS: Supp Fig 16b not in MOESM10
F. INVESTIGATION: The analysis worker indicated the source data for Supplementary Figure 16b (GLI3 expression fold change in S462TY cells treated with sonidegib) was not available in the supplementary data file (MOESM10) that was accessible. Without the underlying numerical data for the RT-qPCR / expression measurements shown in Supp Fig 16b, the model is unable to compute the fold change and therefore cannot confirm or refute the reported value of ~0.32. This is a case of source data absent from the provided supplementary materials.
G. ROOT CAUSE: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING — the required source data for Supp Fig 16b was not included in the accessible supplementary files (MOESM10), preventing any computation. This is not a cohort, variable, or statistical methodology issue; it is strictly a data availability problem.
proposed_fix: Locate the specific supplementary data file containing Supp Fig 16b source data (likely in a separate supplementary MOESM file with RT-qPCR or expression data for S462TY sonidegib-treated cells). Once located, compute the mean fold change of GLI3 expression (sonidegib-treated vs vehicle/DMSO control, n=3 replicates) and compare to the reported value of ~0.32.
